prompt_text: A floral battlefield blooms with deceptive beauty. Camouflaged Corgis spring from flowerbeds in ambush — cute, but deadly.

pass.message: You held your ground against the camouflaged corgis. The petals settle, and you push forward. +1 Max Health gained.

fail.message: The corgis overwhelmed you with speed and ferocity. Your journey ends beneath the blossoms of The Purrgola.
